description_long: This object is a rectangular stage platform with a broad, flat surface extending outward and a raised section at one end, likely serving as a backdrop or step. The main platform is elongated and tapers slightly, providing ample space for performances or presentations. The raised section at the rear is blocky and prominent, possibly functioning as a backdrop, podium, or technical area. The structure appears solid and robust, with clean, straight edges and a uniform, dark finish. Its minimalist design suggests it is intended for functional use in public or event spaces, such as parks, plazas, or urban gathering areas. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or interactive components.
description: A large, rectangular stage platform with a broad, flat surface and a raised block at one end, finished in a uniform dark color.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flat stage surface with the raised block at the far end, emphasizing the platform's depth.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated, tapering platform and the height of the raised section at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the blocky raised section most prominently, with the main platform extending forward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the length and thickness of the stage and the raised rear block.
